changes: Holy Sheltron: Barrier duration reduced from 5 to 4 seconds.
Holy Sheltron: Barrier potency reduced from 12,000 to 8,000.
Holy Sheltron: Unaspected damage dealt upon expiry increased from 100% to 150% of remaining barrier potency.
Knight's Resolve: Effect duration reduced from 10 to 8 seconds.
Confiteor: Damage potency increased from 8,000 to 12,000.
Blade of Faith: Damage potency increased from 6,000 to 7,000.
Blade of Truth: Damage potency increased from 7,000 to 8,000.
Blade of Valor: Damage potency increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Honing Ovation: Attack and barrier potency per stack decreased from 2,000/3,000/4,000/5,000/6,000 to 1,000/2,000/3,000/4,000/5,000.
